name: claude-code-ctx
description: Claude Code context manager + memory engine. Primary install is as a Claude Code plugin (see README). Also usable standalone as a zero-dep CLI: token monitoring against a model-aware quality ceiling, tailored /compact prompt + auto-clipboard, JSONL gzip backup on /clear, BM25 snapshot search, 9 MCP tools (ctx_ask, ctx_shell, ctx_read, ctx_grep, ctx_cache_get + memory), PreToolUse guardrails, system-prompt bloat audit.
author: Tugay Oktay Okay
